summary: Iteration 12 - Tested 4 new features: (1) User Settings dismiss on navigation, (2) Voice channel UI elements, (3) Remote speaking indicators code review, (4) Voice events/ping display code review. All testable features PASSED. WebRTC-dependent features (speaking indicators, voice events, ping) verified via code review only.

minor.issue: 401 errors in console for TURN credentials polling - not blocking functionality

critical_code_review_comments: MainApp.js: All navigation handlers (handleSelectServer, handleSelectDMs, handleSelectFriends, handleSelectConversation, handleSelectChannel) correctly include setShowSettings(null) to dismiss settings panel
VoiceChannel.js: Remote participant tiles correctly use speakingUsers[p.id] to apply border-emerald-500 class for speaking indicator
VoiceChannel.js: Ping display (data-testid='ping-display') correctly positioned above controls with Wifi icon and ms display
VoiceChannel.js: Voice events feed (data-testid='voice-events-feed') correctly renders join/leave toasts with LogIn/LogOut icons
voiceManager.js: speakingUsers state correctly tracks remote user speaking via createAudioLevelDetector
voiceManager.js: voiceEvents state correctly populated from voice_state_update WebSocket messages with user_joined_name/user_left_name
voiceManager.js: ping state correctly measured from WebRTC stats (currentRoundTripTime)
server.py lines 2801-2824: Backend correctly includes user_joined_name and user_left_name in voice_state_update broadcasts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 features from this iteration verified: (1) Settings dismiss on navigation - TESTED via Playwright, (2) Voice channel UI - TESTED via Playwright, (3) Remote speaking indicators - CODE REVIEW only (requires WebRTC), (4) Voice events/ping - CODE REVIEW only (requires WebRTC). Note: WebRTC features cannot be tested in headless browser due to no mic access.

verified_features.settings_dismiss_on_dms_click: PASS - Settings panel closes when clicking DMs button

verified_features.join_voice_btn_visible: PASS - Join button visible with data-testid='join-voice-btn'
verified_features.voice_settings_btn_visible: PASS - Settings button visible with data-testid='voice-settings-btn'
verified_features.voice_float_hidden_when_not_in_call: PASS - VoiceFloat widget NOT visible when not in a call
verified_features.ping_display_code_review: PASS - Code correctly shows ping above disconnect controls (data-testid='ping-display')
verified_features.voice_events_feed_code_review: PASS - Code correctly shows join/leave toasts (data-testid='voice-events-feed')
verified_features.remote_speaking_indicator_code_review: PASS - Code correctly applies border-emerald-500 to speaking remote participants
verified_features.backend_voice_state_update: PASS - Backend includes user_joined_name and user_left_name in broadcasts
